originalTitle: Popular Tanzanian musician Matonya charged with rape in Kenya
title: Popular Tanzanian musician Matonya charged with rape in Kenya
content: The 43-year-old denies the charge and has been released on bail and had to surrender his passport.

originalTitle: Fears over West Africa's Islamist insurgency dominate Benin's election campaign
title: Fears over West Africa's Islamist insurgency dominate Benin's election campaign
content: Cross-border raids from militant Islamists are increasingly threatening the West African state's stability.

originalTitle: US has let in 4,499 refugees since October - all but three were South African
title: US has let in 4,499 refugees since October - all but three were South African
content: Trump has given priority to Afrikaners, a white minority group he says is being persecuted. South Africa has objected to his characterisation.

originalTitle: ‘Closer to a break than ever’: Can NATO survive if Trump pulls the US out?
title: ‘Closer to a break than ever’: Can NATO survive if Trump pulls the US out?
content: The war in Iran has deepened a rift in the transatlantic alliance, raising questions about whether it can endure.

originalTitle: Cuban president defiant despite Trump pressure to resign
title: Cuban president defiant despite Trump pressure to resign
content: Miguel Diaz-Canel vows to resist US pressure as Trump escalates threats, tightens oil blockade on the island.

originalTitle: Gaza families still unable to bury dead six months into ‘ceasefire’
title: Gaza families still unable to bury dead six months into ‘ceasefire’
content: About 10,000 Palestinians remain missing, believed to be buried under rubble of collapsed buildings during Israel's war.

originalTitle: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
title: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
content: The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks.

originalTitle: Ceasefire or no ceasefire, the Middle East's reshuffling is not yet done
title: Ceasefire or no ceasefire, the Middle East's reshuffling is not yet done
content: Both sides have reason to end the war but share no common ground.

originalTitle: Melania Trump denies ties to Jeffrey Epstein and urges hearing for survivors
title: Melania Trump denies ties to Jeffrey Epstein and urges hearing for survivors
content: She called rumours that Epstein introduced her to Donald Trump "mean-spirited attempts to defame my reputation".

originalTitle: Guardiola would 'love' Silva to stay at Man City
title: Guardiola would 'love' Silva to stay at Man City
content: Pep Guardiola says he would "love" captain Bernardo Silva to "finish his career" at Manchester City but it is up to the player to make the decision on whether he stays or leaves this summer.

originalTitle: I feel complete backing from owners and fans - Slot
title: I feel complete backing from owners and fans - Slot
content: Liverpool manager Arne Slot insists he feels "complete support" from the club's hierarchy and fans despite a run of poor on-field performances and growing discontent about his future as manager

originalTitle: Howe '100% committed' to Newcastle but 'I just need support'
title: Howe '100% committed' to Newcastle but 'I just need support'
content: Head coach Eddie Howe says he is "100% committed" to Newcastle United, but it is "very difficult" to look too far beyond the end of the season.
